approved_successor_decision.approval_basis: user directive: 按七项推荐冻结并实施

aggregate_report.applies_when: The artifact performs registered statistics or qualitative/failure-case selection.
aggregate_report.required_artifact: manifest binding every contributing task-seed evaluation artifact with no missing-cell imputation

checkpoint_linked_evaluation.applies_when: The variant changes only pool size, inference top-k, corruption severity, or resolution preprocessing.
checkpoint_linked_evaluation.required_artifact: immutable evaluation manifest binding the exact step-7000 parent model payload SHA256 and every evaluator/data/index/preprocessor hash

learned_training_checkpoint.applies_when: The variant changes the supervised target, training retrieval conditioning, H/K tensor layout, or training time view.

nonlearned_method_artifact.required_artifact: immutable manifest binding code, pool, feature/index, alignment, projection, seed-controlled tie breaking, per-window outputs, and output hashes

authorization_evidence: The user explicitly replied '我授权' after being shown the proposed minimum claim-centered scope, Docker test permission, and nonlearned retrieval_only artifact rule.

checkpoint_storage_contract.intermediate_policy: Each full DCP must be component/rank validated and fully hashed before pruning. Persist its audit manifest, payload hash, byte counts, loss/log pointers, creation time, validation time, and prune time. Keep the newest full resumable DCP until its successor is validated.
checkpoint_storage_contract.primary_step_7000_policy: Validate and hash the complete DCP, then permanently retain the model component, metadata, resolved config, runtime binding, logs, and audit manifest. The optimizer component may be pruned only after the retained model loads successfully for a fixed heldout-free contract inference smoke.

claim_boundary: This supplement freezes how future P2 artifacts are produced and audited. It contains no experiment result and does not pass P2, M5-v03, Gate C, or M6.

5_temporal.materialization_point: uint8 model video input before tokenizer.encode

6_resolution.ranking: same frozen WAN encoder, same candidates, same seeded ties, per-query top-k

formal_inference_contract.action_extraction: extract_action_chunk_from_latent_sequence using the checkpoint-bound action decoder and action latent index
formal_inference_contract.checkpoint: fixed step-7000 retained model DCP only
formal_inference_contract.nonfinite_policy: count and invalidate the task-seed artifact; never replace with a finite value
formal_inference_contract.rotation_projection: Gram-Schmidt projection of the two 3D rotation columns followed by right-handed cross product

formal_launch_preconditions: separate launch activation v2 is approved

guardrail_contract.saturation_definition: at least five consecutive predicted residual steps above the train-only residual-norm P99

heldout_retrieval_contract.nested_pool_rule: the first N pool_rank episodes for the heldout task

M5B-ACTION-01.new_checkpoints: phase-aligned view and lag-calibrated diagnostic x 3 seeds

M5B-QUAL-01.artifacts: three seed-level case manifests plus one all-seed aggregate report

M5B-RES-01.variants: checkpoint-linked evaluation using the same parent and frozen visual encoder

M5B-SENS-01.new_checkpoints: H/K=4/4 and H/K=16/8 at top-k=3 x 3 seeds

M5B-TIME-01.temporal_corruptions: checkpoint-linked evaluation only on the nominal30 parent

metric_and_statistics_contract.bootstrap: 10,000 hierarchical paired resamples; sample four tasks with replacement, then three seeds with replacement within each sampled task; report percentile 2.5/97.5 bounds; RNG seed 20260711
metric_and_statistics_contract.effect_estimator: median of the 12 task-seed paired differences
metric_and_statistics_contract.missing_unit_policy: invalidate the comparison and rerun; no imputation
metric_and_statistics_contract.multiple_comparison: Holm step-down adjustment across the two primary comparisons
metric_and_statistics_contract.paired_difference: recap_hand_ret minus baseline; negative favors RECAP
metric_and_statistics_contract.primary_unit: one position_error_median_canonical per heldout_task x seed
metric_and_statistics_contract.randomization_test: exact one-sided sign-flip test over all 2^12 task-seed differences using the arithmetic mean paired difference as test statistic; raw p is the fraction of permutations <= the observed statistic
metric_and_statistics_contract.task_improvement_rule: a task improves only when its median across the three seed-level paired differences is < 0

representation_contract.future_state: predict per-step 10D state transitions: step 0 is query[0]-current_state and step i is query[i]-query[i-1]; reconstruct by cumulative addition from current_state, then project rotation 6D and clip gripper
representation_contract.normalization: separate train-only min/max statistics for every representation; heldout targets never enter statistics
representation_contract.residual: predict query_target_10d minus aligned_human_plan_10d and reconstruct by addition

geometry.distance: L2 distance after flattening and per-vector L2 normalization
geometry.insufficient_history_policy: reject the query or candidate before ranking; never pad across a segment
geometry.pool_feature: the H human-plan states ending at the candidate anchor, expressed as per-step 10D differences relative to the anchor state and standardized with the same train-only statistics
geometry.query_feature: the last H segment-safe observed robot states ending at the current row, expressed as per-step 10D differences relative to the current state and standardized with train-only statistics

geometry_plus_visual.feature: concatenate independently L2-normalized geometry and visual vectors with weights 1/sqrt(2) each

phase.pool_feature: normalized segment phase of the human-only candidate window
phase.query_feature: normalized segment phase computed from rows at or before the current observation

random.ranking: ascending seeded tie-break hash over the leakage-safe same-task candidate set

visual.encoder: the frozen local Cosmos-Predict2.5 WAN tokenizer encoder used by the formal model
visual.feature: encode four identical copies of the preprocessed anchor RGB frame, take the anchor latent frame, spatially mean-pool every channel, then L2 normalize
visual.pool_image: human-only image at the candidate anchor

top_k_inference_contract.aggregation: inverse-normalize and reconstruct each canonical trajectory first, average canonical 10D predictions equally, project rotation 6D to a valid rotation, and clip gripper to [0,1]
top_k_inference_contract.execution: run one deterministic model inference for each ranked retrieved plan
top_k_inference_contract.pool0: mask retrieval conditioning and run the no-retrieval-compatible path; retrieval_only at pool0 is not a primary comparison unit

training_retrieval_contract.candidate_scope: segment-safe windows from the same train task; the query window and every row overlapping its target horizon are excluded
training_retrieval_contract.candidate_shortage_policy: use all available candidates when 1 <= available < k; reject the sample when available is 0
training_retrieval_contract.conditioning_aggregation: one training example is emitted per retrieved plan and receives weight 1/effective_k so every original query has total weight one
training_retrieval_contract.fairness: all learned methods see the same original query set, total query weight, augmentation count, optimizer steps, per-rank batch, DP world size, and initialization

variant_materialization.action: Every variant binds an immutable derived-view manifest. Negative controls are inference-time injections and must trigger the registered detector before metric acceptance.
variant_materialization.h_k: H controls retrieved history/plan length and K controls predicted query length; incomplete or segment-crossing windows are rejected.
variant_materialization.resolution: source426, crop424, and crop424-edge-pad426 all end at 224 model input and use the exact same frozen visual encoder checkpoint.
variant_materialization.time: Every training time view binds its existing view manifest SHA. Corruptions are deterministic inference-time transforms and severe invalid inputs must be rejected or masked before model invocation.
